EYEWITNESS REPORTED SMALL TORNADO RIP BRANCHES OFF A FEW WHITE PINES AND TOSS THEM INTO THE AIR BEFORE CROSSING HIGHWAY 21 NEAR HILLSIDE ROAD. TORNADO WAS THEN OBSERVED TO QUICKLY DISSIPATED NEAR A CUSTARD STAND PARKING LOT ON THE OPPOSITE SIDE HIGHWAY 21. EYEWITNESS INDICATED TORNADO WAS MOVING TOWARD THE WEST...WAS ABOUT 30 FEET WIDE AND ON THE GROUND FOR ABOUT 10 TO 15 SECONDS. EMPLOYEES IN THE CUSTARD STAND ALSO OBSERVED RAIN BLOWING HORIZONTALLY. NO OTHER DAMAGE WAS REPORTED.
